name: slide-deck
description: Standalone zero-JS HTML slide deck rendered as print-friendly stacked slide cards (no navigation or transition scripts): a title slide plus content slides with a heading, bullet points, and an optional speaker note.

slots.description: Deck title; used in <title> and the title-slide h1.
Overline label on the title slide.
Title-slide meta items: presenter, date, slide count, duration.
Content slides; one .slide block each, add class 'invert' for emphasis.

shape.slides[]: { heading: string, bullets: string[], note: string (optional), invert: boolean (optional) }
